title: Drain Fly Treatment in SoHo, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional drain fly treatment in SoHo, Manhattan. Fast, effective solutions for lofts, restaurants & commercial spaces. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service!
intro: Drain flies infesting your SoHo loft, restaurant, or commercial space? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive drain fly treatment services specifically designed for SoHo's unique mix of historic cast-iron buildings and modern establishments. Our licensed technicians eliminate drain fly breeding sites and prevent future infestations with proven methods tailored to your property.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving SoHo's diverse property types—from canal-side lofts to bustling restaurants along Broadway—we understand the unique plumbing challenges of the neighborhood's converted industrial buildings. Our discrete, effective treatments ensure minimal disruption to your business or home while delivering guaranteed results.
localContext: SoHo's iconic cast-iron architecture and converted manufacturing lofts often feature older plumbing systems that create ideal breeding grounds for drain flies in kitchens, bathrooms, and basement drains. The neighborhood's high concentration of restaurants, art galleries, and residential lofts between Canal Street and Houston Street requires specialized pest control expertise that respects both historic preservation and modern sanitation standards.

faqs.question: Why are drain flies common in SoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: SoHo's historic cast-iron buildings and converted lofts often have aging plumbing systems with organic buildup in drains, creating perfect breeding conditions for drain flies. The neighborhood's mix of residential and commercial spaces, particularly restaurants and food establishments, also contributes to drain fly populations when pipes aren't regularly maintained.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in a SoHo loft?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in SoHo properties take 1-2 hours depending on the size and number of drains. Our technicians inspect all potential breeding sites, treat affected drains with bio-enzymatic cleaners and targeted insecticides, and provide prevention recommendations. Follow-up visits may be scheduled to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection of all drains, identification of breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic treatments, mechanical cleaning when needed, application of residual products, and a detailed prevention plan. Pricing varies based on property size, number of drains, and infestation severity. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Can you treat drain flies in SoHo restaurants during business hours?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible scheduling for SoHo businesses including early morning, late evening, and weekend appointments to minimize disruption. Our treatments use food-safe, EPA-approved products suitable for commercial kitchens and comply with NYC health department regulations. We work efficiently to keep your establishment operational.
